$comment: Super Rick Standards — the version registry. Each product that wears the Super Rick identity pins the standards version it implements. To answer 'which Super Rick Standards is product X on?', read this file. Bump a product's pinned_standards_version when it adopts a newer standard.

products.surface: The Presence orb — voice-first cinematic UI
products.notes: The canonical orb; this standard is extracted from its live code. Shipped v0.1.4 (c3246ba): HUD above orb, WebGL fallback, streaming audio, DevPanel.

products.surface: Voice tech stack hub — documentation + status + smoke receipts
products.notes: References this standard from interfaces/orb. Pinned v1.1.1 — voice-fleet-cassette-truth (NeuTTS :8096 live Jun 30).
